headline: Stock Market Today: Dow Up As Oil Prices Fall; This Memory Play Clears Entry As Nvidia Pops (Live Coverage)
summary: Stock Market Today: The Dow Jones index rose Monday as oil prices backed off from $100. Nvidia stock rallied ahead of Huang's keynote speech.

headline: Elizabeth Warren asks Meta, Amazon, and others why they're laying workers off despite tax perks
summary: Sen. Elizabeth Warren is grilling several major employers, including Amazon, Target, and UPS, about their recent spate of layoffs amid tax perks to corporations.

raw.headline: Elizabeth Warren asks Meta, Amazon, and others why they're laying workers off despite tax perks

headline: This Schwab ETF Holds 100 Dividend Stocks, Charges $6 a Year, and Yields More Than Most Savings Accounts
summary: Schwab U.S. Dividend Equity ETF (NYSEARCA:SCHD) costs $6 a year on a $10,000 investment, holds 100 dividend stocks, and currently yields 3.39%. With the Fed funds rate sitting at 3.75% and most high-yield savings accounts paying in that same neighborhood, the yield gap is narrow. But SCHD adds something a savings account never will: price ... This Schwab ETF Holds 100 Dividend Stocks, Charges $6 a Year, and Yields More Than Most Savings Accounts

headline: Chart Of The Day: Yes, Slow And Steady Can Still Win
